sub-wizards to persist tenant-level preferences.

get.description:
Get agent orchestration data
SOLID: SRP - Only routing
Returns all agents with their status, current tasks, and performance metrics

post.description:
POST /api/v1/deploy/agents/from-template/:templateId
Spawn a single agent from a platform template and assign to a tenant.
Tenants (OWNER/ADMIN) may spawn into their own tenant only.

POST /api/v1/deploy/tenants/:tenantId/agents
Bulk-deploy multiple agents (from templates) to a tenant.
All-or-nothing transaction. SUPER_ADMIN only.

POST /api/v1/deploy/tenants/:tenantId/dept-template
Deploy a full department template structure to a tenant.
Optionally bootstraps head agents for each department. SUPER_ADMIN only.

POST /api/v1/deploy/tenants/:tenantId/departments
Deploy a SINGLE department from a DepartmentTemplate's `structure` array
(by item index). Useful when tenants want to add one department without
re-deploying the whole template. SUPER_ADMIN only.

Returns approvals stratified into critical and routine, with AI recommendations.
GET /approvals/:id/history — full lifecycle timeline of an approval request

post.description:
POST /approvals/:id/feedback

Collect user feedback on AI recommendations
Used for: learning loop, model retraining, accuracy tracking

Body:
{
  userDecision: 'APPROVED' | 'REJECTED',
  aiRecommendation: 'APPROVE' | 'REJECT' | 'ESCALATE' | 'REVIEW',
  reason: 'wrong_fit' | 'bad_timing' | 'quality_issue' | 'other',
  explanation?: string
}

SRP: Only stores feedback, doesn't modify approval status

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tag list; AND-match (every tag must match).

parameters.name: vectorWeight
parameters.description: Weight for vector similarity. (1 - α) is BM25 keyword weight.

get.description:
GET /command-center/summary

Returns aggregated dashboard data:
- Active agents count
- Pending tasks/workflows
- Approvals pending
- Monthly costs
- Recent activity

get.summary: Get impact timeline for command center
get.description:
GET /command-center/timeline

Returns impact-sorted timeline of events:
- Approval requests needing action
- Task completions/failures
- Agent status changes
- Critical alerts

Query Parameters:
- sort: 'impact' | 'recent' | 'priority' (default: 'impact')
- filter: 'all' | 'urgent' | 'my-action' | 'opportunities' | 'blockers'
- search: search term for event title/description
- limit: max results (default: 20)
- page: pagination (default: 1)

post.description: Records user feedback when their decision differs from AI recommendation. Used for model learning.

get.description:
GET /api/v1/packages/deploy/preview?packageId=&tenantId=
Dry-run a package deployment. Returns blockers + capacity snapshot.
Same scope rules as deploy (OWNER/ADMIN → own tenant, SUPER_ADMIN → any).

post.summary: Deploy a package composition to a tenant
post.description:
POST /api/v1/packages/deploy
Apply a package composition to a tenant in one transaction.
OWNER/ADMIN may only deploy to their own tenant.

info.title: NeureCore API
info.description: Enterprise AI Operating System — REST + WebSocket + SSE

billingProfile.description:
Billing profile JSON shape:
  { taxId?, taxRegion?, billingContactName?, billingContactEmail?,
    billingAddress?: AddressDto, paymentMethod?: 'CARD'|'BANK_TRANSFER'|'INVOICE_ONLY'|'NONE',
    poNumber?, invoiceCadence?: 'monthly'|'quarterly'|'yearly',
    dunningEmail? }

Free-form Json for now — strong typing lands in PR-5 (billing wizard).

name.description: Human-readable name override — required so each deployed agent has a context-specific name

tenantId.description: Target tenant to receive the new agent

authorityLevel.description: Override authority level stored in agent config

withAgents.description: When true, also creates agents for each dept item using matching platform agent templates

itemIndex.description: Index into the template's `structure` JSON array (0-based)

question.example: What is our Q3 sales methodology?

stream.description: If true, return SSE stream; if false, block until done.

content.description: Full text content. Will be chunked + embedded.

entityTypes.description: Entity types this knowledge applies to.

headAgentType.description: Agent type hint — helps auto-pick a template during deployment

parentName.description: Name of a parent dept item within the same structure array

agentTemplateNames.description: Optional list of platform agent template names to auto-spawn when deploying tiers

definition.description: DAG definition — nodes + edges stored in Prisma `definition` JSON

nodes.description: Individual nodes array (extracted from definition for frontend convenience)

edges.description: Individual edges array (extracted from definition for frontend convenience)

_count.description: Virtual — not stored in DB, computed at service layer

i.description: Widget definition id from the registry

items.description: Ordered list of grid items with sizes

acceptWarnings.description: If true, install even when pre-flight checks produced non-blocking warnings (e.g. suggested integrations are not yet connected). Defaults to false.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional client-supplied idempotency key. If a previous install request with the same key already succeeded for this tenant+pack, the existing install is returned.

entityType.description: Entity type the widget is being computed against

withAgents.description:
Whether to also create AI Employee instances from the package's
aiAgents composition. Default true. When false, only departments
are created (e.g. if tenant already has the agents from a previous deploy).

authorityLevel.description: Optional authority level override applied to every spawned agent

idempotent.description:
When true, the deploy becomes idempotent: re-running for the same
(packageId, tenantId) pair skips agents whose name + tenant already
exist. Default true.
